protein_name: Blocks the elongation and depolymerization of the actin filaments at the pointed end. The Tmod/TM complex contributes to the formation of the short actin protofilament, which in turn defines the geometry of the membrane skeleton. Belongs to the tropomodulin family. Ubiquitous. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: actin binding; protein binding; tropomyosin binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: actin filament organization; cell-cell adhesion; muscle contraction; myofibril assembly; pointed-end actin filament capping
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: TMOD3; tropomodulin 3; tropomodulin 3 (ubiquitous); Tropomodulin-3; U-Tmod; Ubiquitous tropomodulin; UTMOD
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 5.08 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
